dct_title_s: Aegypti ac nobilissimi ejus fluminis a cataractis usque ad ostia fidelis atque accurata descriptio, additis passim : e Diodoro Strabone, Ptolomaeo, Josepho, aliisque veteribus oppidorum nomibus
dct_alternative_sm: Carte de l'Egypte et le cours du Nil
dct_description_sm: Auctore Ricardo Pococke Anglo. S.R. et A. Socio. Amstelodami apud Covens et Mortier.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Shows the Nile Delta and settlements.
Bar scales on map: "Milliaria Germanica 15 in uno Gradu", "Milliaria Anglica querum 60 Gradum Conficiunt", "Milliaria Italica 75 in uno Gradu", "Leucoe Gallicoe 20 in uno Gradu".
Decorative cartouche in lower left featuring cornucopia, obelisk, crocodile, and lounging male figure wearing a laurel wreath.
Inset maps : -- [1] Ostia Nili Secundum Herodotum -- [2] Strabonem -- [3] Diodorum -- [4] Plinium -- [5] Ptolemaeum
